creative_direction.reasoning: Duo the owl mascot is a proprietary brand asset that must be rendered in Duolingo's exact house illustration style — image gen needs a specific prompt or a composite from the brand kit. Phone UI card with language list + flags requires recognizable flag accuracy. Track B: generate saturated blue canvas + mascot + phone card frame with flag icons; overlay headline.
creative_direction.concept_one_liner: Duo peeks toward a phone card showing 10 languages with flags — breadth claim without bullet points.

nano_banana_json.scene: Saturated cobalt blue canvas with the two-line white sans headline 'Start building your / language fluency' in the top-left, Duo the owl mascot peeking in from the middle-left, a stylized phone-UI card on the right showing a 'Courses' list with country-flag icons, and the 'duolingo' lowercase wordmark in the bottom-left corner.

color_palette.role: Duo eye outlines + flag detail ink

zones: Top 8-30%: headline 'Start building your / language fluency' in white ExtraBold rounded sans (Duolingo Feather), 2 lines, top-left aligned
Middle-left 30-75%: Duo the owl mascot peeking in from left edge, only ~70% of body visible, gaze points right toward phone card

Right 40-95%: white rounded-rectangle phone card showing 'Courses' header and a vertical list of languages each with a flag icon and chevron (Spanish, French, German, Italian, Japanese, Chinese, Russian, Korean, Portuguese, Arabic)
Bottom-left: 'duolingo' lowercase wordmark in white rounded sans

text_elements_in_image.font: Duolingo Feather Bold (or Nunito Rounded ExtraBold — rounded geometric sans)

nano_banana_json.duo_mascot_spec: Duo the owl: cartoon flat-color illustration, bright green (#58CC02) body, oval shape, big white eyes with black pupils, small orange triangular beak (#FFA916), tiny orange triangular feet visible at bottom. Peeking in from left edge — only front half of body visible, head tilted slightly, expression curious/smiling. NO drop shadow. Drawn in Duolingo's official house illustration style.
nano_banana_json.phone_card_spec: Large rounded-rectangle white card (no phone chrome, just a card) occupying the right 55% of canvas. 'Courses' header in medium sans top-center. Below: vertical list of 10 language rows, each row has a circular country flag icon on the left (~36px), language name in the center (left-aligned), and a > chevron on the right. Flags: Spain (red/yellow/red horizontal), France (blue/white/red vertical), Germany (black/red/yellow horizontal), Italy (green/white/red vertical), Japan (white with red circle), China (red with yellow stars), Russia (white/blue/red horizontal), South Korea (white with red/blue yin-yang), Brazil (green with yellow diamond and blue globe — representing Portuguese), Saudi Arabia (green with white text — representing Arabic).
negative_prompt: Duo must be in Duolingo's official style (not generic cartoon owl)
no dark backgrounds (canvas must be saturated cobalt)

prompt_track_B_background_only.description: Generate blue canvas + Duo mascot + phone card with flags. All typography overlaid in post.

nano_banana_json.scene: Saturated Duolingo cobalt blue #1CB0F6 canvas 1080x1080. Duo the owl cartoon mascot (bright green #58CC02 oval body, big white eyes with black pupils, orange triangular beak, flat illustration style) peeking in from left edge ~30% from top, occupying middle-left region. On the right 55%: a large white rounded-rectangle card with 'Courses' header in medium sans, and 10 language rows each with a country flag circle, language name, and chevron (Spanish, French, German, Italian, Japanese, Chinese, Russian, Korean, Portuguese, Arabic). Top-left reserved empty blue space for headline. Bottom-left reserved for wordmark.
negative_prompt: no headline text (reserved zone must be empty blue)
no wordmark text (reserved zone must be empty blue)
keep the 'Courses' label and language row labels inside the phone card (those ARE part of the generated UI)

elements.font_family: Duolingo Feather Bold / Nunito Rounded ExtraBold

assets.name: Duo the owl mascot
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: See duo_mascot_spec above. Cartoon flat-color illustration, bright green body, big white eyes with black pupils, orange triangular beak. Official Duolingo house style — NOT a generic cartoon owl.
assets.fidelity_confidence: low — image-gen often misses the Duolingo-specific stylization; composite recommended

assets.name: Duolingo wordmark
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: 'duolingo' lowercase, Duolingo's custom Feather Bold type, rounded terminals, white.

assets.name: Country flag icons (10)
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: Ten circular flag icons with accurate flag designs — see phone_card_spec.
assets.fidelity_confidence: medium — flags are well-trained but details may be off

patterns_exemplified: B9 mascot peeking into product UI
A2 flag grid as implicit breadth
prompt_writer_training_notes: Duo the owl is hard — name 'Duolingo Feather Bold' type + 'Duolingo's official house illustration style' explicitly. Generic 'cartoon owl' produces wrong output. Saturated cobalt (#1CB0F6) is the brand — never pale blue. Flag list is a breadth signal; all 10 languages must be listed (not abbreviated). Lowercase wordmark is intentional — do not auto-capitalize.
